data.description: IDF Spokesperson: 'Following alerts about the infiltration of an unmanned aerial vehicle that was operated a short time ago in the Gaza envelope area, the Air Force successfully intercepted an unmanned aerial vehicle launched from Yemen.'

data.title: Coinbase CEO predicts $1M for Bitcoin. Cryptos dip before Powell's Jackson Hole speech, signaling volatility.
data.description: Today, major cryptocurrencies are experiencing high volatility, with key players in the market showing a bearish trend. This movement comes as investors eagerly await the remarks of Jerome Powell at the Jackson Hole Symposium. The focus is on the potential impact of Powell's statements on the cryptocurrency market, and this anticipation has led to increased uncertainty and fluctuations in prices. Traders are closely monitoring the situation as Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other leading cryptocurrencies are currently exhibiting a downward trend. This heightened activity underscores the importance of Powell's comments, with the cryptocurrency market keeping a close eye on any signals or announcements that may influence its future direction.

data.title: Fed Chair Jerome Powell hints at potential interest rate cut in September, citing changing economic risks.
data.description: Jerome H. Powell expressed that the distribution of risks throughout the economy has begun to change, increasing the likelihood of a decrease in borrowing costs by the central bank at the upcoming September meeting.

data.description: Florham Park, New Jersey - On August 22, 2025, Reworld Holding Corporation initiated a cash tender offer for all of its 5.000% Senior Notes due in 2030. The company is offering to purchase all outstanding Notes following specific terms and conditions.

data.title: Agricultural Pheromone Market Poised for Growth, Expected to Hit USD 11.38 Billion by 2032 | Coherent Market Insights
data.description: The global agricultural pheromone market is valued at USD 4.90 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 11.38 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 12.8%. The market growth is driven by the increasing adoption of pheromones in integrated pest management due to population growth and decreasing agricultural land availability. The market is expected to grow more than 2.3 times during the forecast period. Sex pheromones are the leading type with 45.6% market share, while field crops hold the majority of the market by 2025. Crop protection is the most profitable application with 52.6% market share in 2025. North America dominates the market with 29.9% share, while Asia Pacific is expected to become a leading region with a 22.3% market share. The market growth is fueled by the rising demand for sustainable pest control solutions; however, high costs and target-specific nature of pheromones could hinder market growth.

data.title: Coinbase enhances security measures following North Korea cyber threat targeting remote workers; CEO Brian Armstrong details stricter hiring rules.
data.description: Coinbase, a popular cryptocurrency exchange platform, is taking steps to enhance its security measures following an incident where North Korean hackers took advantage of its remote work policy. The company's CEO, Brian Armstrong, has announced plans to implement stricter hiring practices in response to this breach. This decision comes after a revelation that a substantial number of employees fell victim to the cyberattack, prompting Coinbase to fortify its defenses against future threats.

data.description: The market size of Industrial Automation Equipment was recorded at USD 561,840 million in 2024. By 2031, it is estimated to grow to USD 833,470 million.
